steps.name: Given user logs in as "siteadmin" with password "admin_password"
When user navigates to "Videos" section of Manage
When user "searches" the entity "Single Language Transcript" from Manage "Videos" using Filter "Latest First"
Then user clicks on settings icon
When user goes to "transcripts" page of the video
When user performs "enable" on the transcript
